Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Further Proceedings; Points And Authorities And Declarations Of Robert T. Sullwold And Daun L. Stallons In Support
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Further Proceedings is Granted; Defendant has presented credible evidence establishing that Plaintiff's agreed to arbitrate; arbitration is compelled and this action is stayed pending arbitration. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Continued To Apr-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
